name: Descope MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from Descope (descope-sample-apps org) for their authentication and user identity platform. Enables AI agents to manage users, handle authentication flows, query audit logs, and interact with Descope's identity management capabilities — supporting AI-driven user management and security monitoring workflows.
use_cases: Managing user accounts and permissions from identity management agents
Querying authentication audit logs from security monitoring agents
Automating user provisioning and deprovisioning from HR workflow agents
Integrating Descope identity data into AI-driven security analysis
not_for: Teams using Auth0, Okta, Cognito, or other identity providers
Implementing authentication flows (use Descope's SDK for that)
best_when: A development team using Descope for authentication wants AI agents to help manage users, analyze auth events, and automate identity operations — from the Descope sample apps org.
avoid_when: You use other auth providers. Also: this is from sample-apps org — verify production readiness before deploying in production IAM workflows.

auth.notes: Descope Management Key required. Generated from Descope console. Management keys provide full admin access — use with least-privilege service accounts.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Descope free tier: up to 7,500 MAU
pricing.notes: Descope has a generous free tier. MCP server is free open source. MAU costs on paid tier.

performance.rate_limits: Descope API rate limits by plan

known_agent_gotchas: Management Key provides full admin access to all users — apply strict least-privilege IAM
From descope-sample-apps org — may be demo quality; verify production readiness
User management operations are immediate — test in staging before production agent use
Descope is an emerging auth provider — evaluate production maturity for critical auth workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: IDENTITY SYSTEM ACCESS: Management key provides full user admin capabilities. Strict access controls required. Descope SOC2/GDPR compliant. HTTPS enforced. User data is privacy-sensitive PII.

security_score_components.security_notes: Full user admin access via Management Key. PII data. Descope SOC2 compliant. Strict key management required.
